title: tephrosia subsessilis
intro: Tephrosia subsessilis is a plant species, also known as the creeping bean or bushy pea shrub, belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Tephrosia subsessilis include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, treat fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Tephrosia subsessilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and poultices for its various health benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
